blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey.

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of Grafana Fleet Management
- Determined if a collector has been registered with Fleet Management
- Created an access token and registered a collector with Fleet Management
- Interpreted Fleet Management dashboards so that you can troubleshoot issues with your collectors

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Monitor a Linux server in Grafana Cloud](/docs/learning-paths/linux-server-integration/)
- [Send logs to Grafana Cloud using Alloy](/docs/learning-paths/send-logs-alloy-loki/)
- [Monitor a macOS system in Grafana Cloud](/docs/learning-paths/macos-integration/)
